'''βàöl-v-ch-ch''' ('''kalavchechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electroplate|electroplate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electroplate|electroplate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöl-v-ch-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kalavchechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilavchechoko|thilavchechoko]] || [[word:jilavchechoko|jilavchechoko]] || [[word:shilavchechoko|shilavchechoko]] || [[word:kilavchechoko|kilavchechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulavchechoko|thuthulavchechoko]] || [[word:jujulavchechoko|jujulavchechoko]] || [[word:shushulavchechoko|shushulavchechoko]] || [[word:kukulavchechoko|kukulavchechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulavchechoko|thulavchechoko]] || [[word:julavchechoko|julavchechoko]] || [[word:shulavchechoko|shulavchechoko]] || [[word:kulavchechoko|kulavchechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulavchechoko|thulavchechoko]] || [[word:julavchechoko|julavchechoko]] || [[word:shulavchechoko|shulavchechoko]] || [[word:kulavchechoko|kulavchechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelavchechoko|thelavchechoko]] || [[word:jelavchechoko|jelavchechoko]] || [[word:shelavchechoko|shelavchechoko]] || [[word:kelavchechoko|kelavchechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholavchechoko|thotholavchechoko]] || [[word:jojolavchechoko|jojolavchechoko]] || [[word:shosholavchechoko|shosholavchechoko]] || [[word:kokolavchechoko|kokolavchechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholavchechoko|tholavchechoko]] || [[word:jolavchechoko|jolavchechoko]] || [[word:sholavchechoko|sholavchechoko]] || [[word:kolavchechoko|kolavchechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholavchechoko|tholavchechoko]] || [[word:jolavchechoko|jolavchechoko]] || [[word:sholavchechoko|sholavchechoko]] || [[word:kolavchechoko|kolavchechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠlavchechoko|thΟΠlavchechoko]] || [[word:jΟΠlavchechoko|jΟΠlavchechoko]] || [[word:shΟΠlavchechoko|shΟΠlavchechoko]] || [[word:kΟΠlavchechoko|kΟΠlavchechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalavchechoko|thathalavchechoko]] || [[word:jajalavchechoko|jajalavchechoko]] || [[word:shashalavchechoko|shashalavchechoko]] || [[word:kakalavchechoko|kakalavchechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalavchechoko|thalavchechoko]] || [[word:jalavchechoko|jalavchechoko]] || [[word:shalavchechoko|shalavchechoko]] || [[word:kalavchechoko|kalavchechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalavchechoko|thalavchechoko]] || [[word:jalavchechoko|jalavchechoko]] || [[word:shalavchechoko|shalavchechoko]] || [[word:kalavchechoko|kalavchechoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalavchechithi|shalavchechithi]] || [[word:shalavchechiji|shalavchechiji]] || [[word:shalavchechishi|shalavchechishi]] || [[word:shalavchechiki|shalavchechiki]]
